description: The luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style. UpperLeather upper for rugged feel and styleOver-the-foot vertical and horizontal straps for added comfortBack strap with a Velcro closure to hold the foot firmly in placeContrast thread detailing for added structure and styleBrand tab appliqué d on the frontWell cushioned footbed for all-day comfortFabric and suede lining for soft touch and protection from blistersOutsoleTPU outsole provides durable traction on a variety of surfacesHerringbone grooves for maximum traction and ease of movementSandal careUse a leather brush to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
